name: Bar
description: Coastal town known for its olive groves, the historic Old Town of Stari Bar and a lively seaside promenade.

name: Budva
description: The heart of the Montenegrin riviera — beaches, a medieval Old Town and a busy festival calendar all summer long.

name: Kotor
description: UNESCO-listed bay town with venetian walls, cathedral squares and a thriving arts and culture scene.

name: Tivat
description: Home of Porto Montenegro — yachting, waterfront dining, concerts and open-air events on the Boka bay.

name: Ulcinj
description: Montenegro's southernmost town — the 13 km Velika Plaža beach, an ancient Old Town and big summer music festivals.

name: Podgorica
description: Montenegro's capital — theatres, galleries, sports arenas, nightlife and the country's biggest event venues.

name: Vennesla
description: Friendly town on the Otra river in Agder, known for its award-winning library, outdoor life and community events.
